item.title: Judge dismisses lawsuit by Musk's X Corp accusing advertisers of illegal boycott
item.description: A U.S. judge вҖӢon Thursday dismissed вҖҢX Corp's antitrust lawsuit that accused вҖӢthe World вҖӢFederation of Advertisers and вҒ a group вҖӢof major companies вҖӢincluding Mars, CVS Health and Colgate-Palmolive of illegally вҖӢboycotting billionaire вҖӢentrepreneur Elon MuskвҖҷs social вҖҢmedia вҒ company.

item.title: Novo Nordisk appoints Mars CEO as board observer
item.description: Novo Nordisk on Thursday elected Poul Weihrauch, CEO вҖӢof family-owned U.S. candy and pet food вҖҢgiant Mars, as observer to its board, as the drugmaker seeks to strengthen its position in the highly вҖӢcompetitive U.S. obesity market.

item.title: Tom Brady-backed telehealth firm eMed valued at over $2 billion in latest funding round
item.description: Telehealth firm eMed said on Thursday it has raised $200 million in its latest funding round, вҖӢvaluing the Miami, Florida-based company at more than $2 billion.

item.title: Blackstone invests $250 million in UAE despite war disruption
item.description: Blackstone has invested $250 million in Advanced Digital Gaming Technology, a new payments and data intelligence technology platform based in the вҖӢUnited Arab Emirates, the asset manager said in a statement вҖҢon Thursday.

item.title: GlobalFoundries files patent infringement lawsuits against Tower Semiconductor
item.description: GlobalFoundries on вҖӢThursday said it has sued Israel-based rival вҖҢTower Semiconductor , alleging that Tower Semiconductor infringed on 11 GlobalFoundries patents that relate to manufacturing chips that go вҖӢinto smart phones and other electronic вҖӢdevices.

item.title: Bank of Montreal targets 15% return on equity on wealth, US businesses growth
item.description: Bank of Montreal said on Thursday it is targeting a return on equity вҖӢof more than 15% by 2028, as it eyes вҖҢgrowth across its wealth management and U.S. businesses.

item.title: Mexico announces new measures to modernize the motor transport industry
item.description: The Mexican вҖӢgovernment announced on вҖҢThursday a new set of measures aimed вҖӢto support вҖӢthe country's motor transport вҒ industry.

item.title: Defense technology startup Shield AI valued at $12.7 billion in latest funding round
item.description: Shield AI is raising $2 billion in a new funding round at a $12.7 billion valuation, as the defense technology startup looks вҖӢto expand its artificial intelligence-powered software amid growing use вҖҢof autonomous tools during conflicts.

item.title: Russian farmers complain of mobile internet shutdowns amid spring planting
item.description: Russian government measures to shut down mobile internet across the country because of Ukrainian вҖӢdrone attacks are affecting fieldwork during the вҖҢplanting season, a major farming lobby said on Thursday.

item.title: European Payments Initiative CEO says Trump fears are boosting its appeal
item.description: Fears that вҖӢPresident Donald Trump's administration could limit Europe's access to U.S. payments infrastructure are boosting regional вҖҢadoption of a competing European payment platform, the CEO of the European Payments Initiative (EPI) told Reuters.

item.title: Apple adds Bosch, Cirrus Logic, others to US manufacturing program, to invest $400 million
item.description: Apple said it was adding Bosch, Cirrus Logic , TDK вҖӢand Qnity Electronics to its American Manufacturing вҖҢProgram, with plans to invest $400 million through 2030 to expand U.S.-based production of key components.

item.title: Two senators call for US tariff probe into construction and farm equipment
item.description: Two U.S. senators, a Democrat and a Republican, urged the Commerce Department on Thursday to launch a national security investigation вҖӢinto the import of heavy construction and farm equipment made in Mexico вҖҢby companies such as Deere & Co , Caterpillar and CNH Industrial .

item.title: US weekly jobless claims increase slightly
item.description: New applications for U.S. unemployment benefits rose slightly last week, suggesting the labor market remains stable and giving the Federal Reserve scope to hold interest rates steady while monitoring вҖӢinflation risks linked to the Middle East conflict.

item.title: European retailers warn of price shock, weaker demand from prolonged Middle East conflict
item.description: Europe's retailers warned on Thursday that a prolonged Middle East conflict could push up sticker prices in Europe and вҖҢdent consumer demand for companies from clothing giant H&M to British supermarket chain Co-op .

item.title: Crypto for a home? Coinbase brings token-backed down payments to housing market
item.description: It's one of the most ambitious attempts yet вҖӢto adapt digital assets for mainstream needs.

item.title: Iran war chokes petrochemical supply, sends plastic prices soaring
item.description: The Middle East accounted for over 40% of polyethylene exports in 2025.

item.title: German deepfake porn case sparks protests and pressure for change in law
item.description: Germany's вҖӢgovernment is facing pressure to toughen laws against digital violence after a prominent television actor accused her former husband of вҖҢposting AI-generated porn resembling her on fake online accounts purporting to belong to her.

item.title: Helium shortage has started impacting tech supply chains, execs say
item.description: Tightened supply of helium due to the Middle East conflict has started affecting some production in the global tech supply chains, leaving вҖӢcompanies scrambling to secure alternative supplies, industry executives said.

item.title: Fed still set to cut US rates late this year, say economists, rejecting market pricing: Reuters poll
item.description: The Federal Reserve will keep U.S. interest rates on hold until September, according to economists in a Reuters poll who are still clinging to expectations for at least one reduction later this year, despite worries вҖӢabout inflation from war in the Middle East.

item.title: Warner Bros shareholders to vote on $110 billion Paramount deal on April 23, WSJ reports
item.description: Warner Bros Discovery shareholders вҖӢwill vote on its вҖҢplanned $110 billion merger with Paramount Skydance on April 23, the вҖӢWall Street Journal reported вҖӢon Thursday.

item.title: Bertelsmann cranks up legal fight against US book bans as market grows
item.description: Bertelsmann has stepped up legal efforts to counter the soвҖ‘called book bans in the U.S., вҖӢa market that is becoming an increasingly important part вҖҢof the German media group's business, its chief executive said on Thursday.

item.title: WTO chief: world order has irrevocably changed
item.description: The head of the World вҖӢTrade Organization said on Thursday the multilateral system вҖҢhas fundamentally changed and that countries must look to the future to consider how to reform the global trade system.

item.title: Pornhub, Stripchat, XNXX, XVideos charged with breaching EU tech rules, risk fines
item.description: Adult content platforms Pornhub, Stripchat, XNXX and XVideos have been charged with breaching EU rules вҖӢby letting children access pornographic content on their sites, EU вҖҢregulators said on Thursday, which could lead to hefty fines.

item.title: Snapchat hit with EU probe into alleged failure to prevent child grooming, illegal goods sales
item.description: Snap-owned Snapchat was hit with an EU investigation on Thursday as regulators warned that вҖӢthe social platform appears not to be doing вҖҢenough to prevent child grooming and the sale of illegal goods.

item.title: Wall Street bets US corporate earnings will withstand surging oil prices
item.description: Wall Street is confident that strong corporate earnings will prop up stock prices that have slumped since the Iran war began and set oil prices surging, rekindling worries about inflation.

item.title: Morning Bid: Reality check
item.description: What matters in U.S. and global markets today

item.title: OpenAI indefinitely pauses plans to release erotic chatbot, FT says
item.description: OpenAI вҖӢhas shelved plans to вҖҢrelease an erotic chatbot indefinitely as it looks to вҖӢfocus on its core вҖӢproducts, according to a report вҒ by the Financial Times вҖӢon Thursday, citing people вҖӢfamiliar with the matter.

item.title: OECD: Iran war erases global growth upgrade, fans inflation
item.description: The escalating conflict in the Middle East has knocked the global economy off a вҖҢstronger growth path, the OECD warned on Thursday, as a near-halt in energy shipments through the Strait of Hormuz threatens to push inflation sharply higher.

item.title: China's Pony.ai to more than double robotaxi fleet, debuts in Zagreb
item.description: Pony.ai expects to more than double the fleet of robotaxis powered by its technology to over 3,000 units вҖӢacross more than 20 cities globally this year, the вҖҢGuangzhou-based firm said on Thursday as it announced its first-ever quarterly profit.

item.title: UK sanctions Cambodia-based scam centre and crypto platform
item.description: Britain on Thursday sanctioned the operators of what it described as the largest fraud compound in Cambodia and вҖӢan online crypto marketplace used to trade stolen personal вҖҢdata, in a bid to protect people in the UK from organised online scams.
